sources.title: Lionheart (1990) Jean-Claude Van Damme | No mercy. No limits. Only fists and fury. 4K
sources.description:
When family burns, a warrior ignites. Van Damme kicks through deserts and danger to trade punches for pennies in the underground fight circuit!

Original title: Lionheart
Alternative titles: A.W.O.L.: Absent Without Leave, Wrong Bet, Full Contact

🎬 CREW CREDITS
Director: Sheldon Lettich
Writers: Stefani Warren, Jean-Claude Van Damme, Sheldon Lettich
Action Choreography by Jean-Claude Van Damme & François Petit
Cinematography by Robert C. New (The Quest, Double Impact)

⭐️ STARRING
Jean-Claude Van Damme - Lyon "Lionheart" Gaultier
Harrison Page - Joshua Eldridge
Deborah Rennard - Cynthia Caldera
Lisa Pelikan - Hélène Gaultier
Ashley Johnson - Nicole Gaultier
Brian Thompson - Russell
Ash Adams - Francois
Michel Qissi - Moustafa

🎯 WHY WATCH?
Van Damme’s rawest role: fists fly and hearts break in this cult gem!
Underground brawls so intense, you’ll feel every roundhouse kick!
Early grit from the Bloodsport director—where martial arts meet moral stakes!

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics
Action • Martial Arts • Drama • Cult Classics • 90s Cinema • Thriller • Adventure

metadata.Plot: To reunite with this dying brother in Los Angeles, the French Foreign Legion officer, Lyon Gaultier, abandons his unit. Penniless, yet determined to make those who harmed his brother pay, Lyon takes part in an illegal street fight and catches the eye of Cynthia Caldera, an unscrupulous organizer of underground fights. However, as Lyon becomes Lionheart, the unpaid medical bills of his sister-in-law, Hélène, start to pile up. Now, the odds are against Lyon, who desperately wants to help his brother's family. Can Lionheart defeat brutal Attila, the undisputed champion of Cynthia's underground fighting matches?
metadata.Writer: Stefani Warren, Jean-Claude Van Damme, Sheldon Lettich
metadata.Actors: Jean-Claude Van Damme, Harrison Page, Deborah Rennard
